data.title: sprint-next-batch.sh defaults closed ticket deps to open in ticket_status_map
data.description: sprint-next-batch.sh uses ticket_status_map.get(target_id, 'open') to look up dep status, but ticket_status_map is built from --status=open,in_progress tickets only. Closed tickets are excluded from the map, so their status defaults to 'open', causing parent stories to appear as if they have unresolved open blockers when they actually have only closed (complete) deps. This makes sprint-next-batch.sh incorrectly skip ready-to-work tasks during sprint orchestration.
